Lien & Title Research - Run Before Every Call
LI
GA Superior Court Clerks Authority
gsccca.org/search
Who
Georgia statewide real estate index, public access.
Why
Check for open mortgages, liens, satisfactions before you call. If an open security deed exists and was never satisfied, lender gets paid before owner.
Access
Free, no login, search by owner name or parcel ID.
Link
gsccca.org/search
Open Search
QP
qPublic Georgia Parcel Lookup
qpublic.schneidercorp.com
Who
Georgia property assessment database.
Why
Get property address for Clayton County leads that show address pending. Plug in parcel ID and get full address and ownership history.
Access
Free, no login needed.
Link
qpublic.schneidercorp.com
Open Lookup
DD
DeKalb County Deed Records
DeKalb Clerk of Superior Court
Who
DeKalb Clerk of Superior Court.
Why
Full chain of title and security deed search for DeKalb leads.
Phone
(404) 371-2162
Website
publicaccess.dekalbtax.org
Call NowWebsite
State Level - Only If Funds Are 5+ Years Old
GA
Georgia Dept of Revenue - Unclaimed Property Division
Warning: court action required
Who
State agency that holds funds after 5-year county window expires.
Why
If a lead is 5+ years from sale date, the money may have transferred here. Recovery at this stage requires a court interpleader action and an attorney.
Phone
(855) 329-9863
Search Tool
georgia.findyourunclaimedproperty.com
Hours
Mon-Fri 8:00am-4:30pm ET
Warning
Funds here = court action required. Flag these leads and hand to attorney.
Call NowSearch
CT
DeKalb Superior Court - Clerk of Courts
Interpleader and disputed claims
Who
Court clerk for interpleader actions and disputed claims.
Why
Your attorney contacts this office when the county disputes a claim or interpleads funds to the court. You won't call directly but have it ready for your attorney partner.
Phone
(404) 371-2836
Address
556 N McDonough St, Decatur GA 30030
Hours
Mon-Fri 8:00am-5:00pm ET
Call Now
Your Tools & Services
ST
BatchSkipTracing
Skip trace service
Who
Skip trace service.
Why
Get current phone numbers for former owners. Export CSV from dashboard, upload, get phones back same day.
Cost

Website
batchskiptracing.com
Website
DS
DocuSign
E-signature platform
Who
E-signature platform.
Why
Send your Asset Recovery Agreement the same day someone says yes on a call. Have your contract template pre-loaded.
Cost
Free tier - 5 envelopes/month to start
Website
docusign.com
Website
AT
State Bar of Georgia - Attorney Referral
Attorney partner required
Who
Georgia Bar Association referral service.
Why
Find a Georgia-licensed real estate attorney to partner with for filing claims. Required in Georgia - POA not accepted.
Phone
(404) 527-8700
Website
gabar.org
Note
Call and ask for a real estate attorney referral in DeKalb or Clayton County. Offer contingency split - no retainer needed.
Call NowWebsite
What To Ask On Every County Call
  1. "Can you confirm there are excess funds for parcel [ID] / owner [name]?"
  2. "What is the current balance - has any portion already been paid out?"
  3. "Has any claim been filed on this parcel yet?"
  4. "What is the deadline before these funds transfer to the state?"
  5. "What documents does your office require to process a claim?"
  6. "Does the claim need to be filed by a Georgia-licensed attorney?"
  7. "Can you email me the claim form? Who do I address the submission to?"
Call Mon-Thu between 8:00-9:30am ET. Staff are at their desks and hold times are shorter. Never call Fridays after 3pm.
